evals.prompt: Design the spatial UI for a VR medical training application. Surgeons need to select tools from a spatial menu, manipulate 3D organ models with hand gestures, and receive haptic feedback on collision. Spec the interaction model.
evals.expected_output: Comprehensive interaction design specification including spatial menu layout, hand gesture vocabulary for tool selection and manipulation, haptic feedback mapping for collision detection, and ergonomic positioning considerations
expectations: Response references comfort or ergonomic considerations
Response does NOT suggest 2D interface patterns
Response addresses haptic or tactile feedback

evals.prompt: Create an AR interface design for a warehouse picking application on HoloLens. Workers need hands-free interaction, gaze-based selection, and spatial waypoint navigation overlaid on the real environment.
evals.expected_output: AR-specific interaction design with hands-free gesture patterns, gaze targeting and dwell time specifications, spatial waypoint visualization overlaid on warehouse environment, and worker safety considerations
expectations: Response references HoloLens or AR-specific constraints
Response addresses worker safety or real-world integration
Response does NOT focus on game design or entertainment
